purpose: First real historical QQQ Continuation replay v1 fixture. This fixture copies validated 1H RTH source OHLCV rows and covers signal/stage/lifecycle shape only; it excludes trade outcomes, option economics, account sizing, broker execution, live trade decisions, and auto-trading.
boundary_notes: Each fixture row includes only validated QQQ source candles available at or before that row timestamp.
OHLCV values are copied from the validated source CSV without edits or fabricated market data.
Macro, IV, event, and 24H context fields remain unconfirmed because the source CSV does not provide confirmed context values.
Expected output rows are signal/stage/lifecycle assertions only, not live trade instructions or execution recommendations.
This fixture does not include P&L, option contract economics, account sizing, trade outcome, broker/order/execution content, or auto-trading behavior.

lifecycle_rows.source_only_basis: Completed rows through this timestamp show QQQ pulling back into a developing post-impulse shelf/base attempt in the mid-640s; no 04-21 retest, 04-22 recovery, 04-24 higher-base push, 04-30 completed push, or 05-01 extension is used.

market_calendar_session.notes: Regular RTH QQQ Continuation replay row: watching_continuation_pullback_shelf_developing.

expected_output_shape.human_next_step: Signal/stage lifecycle fixture only: watch QQQ Continuation pullback shelf development; this is not a live trade instruction or execution recommendation.

lifecycle_rows.source_only_basis: Completed rows through this timestamp show a retest of the same shelf/base area with the session high at 650.20 and close at 644.28, but no completed recovery above the shelf is available yet.

market_calendar_session.notes: Regular RTH QQQ Continuation replay row: watching_continuation_shelf_retest_no_trigger.

expected_output_shape.human_next_step: Signal/stage lifecycle fixture only: keep watching the QQQ Continuation shelf retest; no fresh completed trigger is present.

lifecycle_rows.source_only_basis: Completed rows through this timestamp show recovery above the 04-20/04-21 shelf area and a 655.08 close, without using the later 04-23 shake, 04-24 recovery, or 04-30 higher-base push.

market_calendar_session.notes: Regular RTH QQQ Continuation replay row: continuation_recovery_above_shelf_candidate.

expected_output_shape.human_next_step: Signal/stage lifecycle fixture only: QQQ has recovered above the shelf as a Continuation candidate; watch for rebuilt structure before treating it as a fresh trigger-stage candidate.

lifecycle_rows.source_only_basis: Completed rows through this timestamp include the 04-23 shake and 04-24 recovery to 664.51/663.91, supporting a higher-base rebuild candidate without using 04-27 through 05-01 rows.

market_calendar_session.notes: Regular RTH QQQ Continuation replay row: continuation_higher_base_rebuild_candidate.

expected_output_shape.human_next_step: Signal/stage lifecycle fixture only: QQQ higher-base rebuild candidate is present after the shake and recovery; wait for a fresh completed trigger-stage push.

lifecycle_rows.source_only_basis: Completed rows through this timestamp show the 04-27 higher base, 04-28 pullback, 04-29 firming, and 04-30 completed push to 668.75/667.60 above the higher-base area; no 05-01 push is used.

market_calendar_session.notes: Regular RTH QQQ Continuation replay row: continuation_triggered_signal_stage_candidate.

expected_output_shape.human_next_step: Signal/stage lifecycle fixture only: completed QQQ Continuation trigger-stage candidate for replay shape; this is not an execution recommendation, live trade instruction, or trade outcome assumption.

lifecycle_rows.source_only_basis: Completed rows through this timestamp show follow-through after the earlier 04-30 completed push; the row marks spent/no-fresh-trigger context only and includes no profitability, option, sizing, execution, or trade outcome assertion.

market_calendar_session.notes: Regular RTH QQQ Continuation replay row: continuation_spent_or_follow_through_no_fresh_trigger.
